articles.title: Delhi Crime Alert: 17-Year-Old Boy Stabbed to Death in New Usmanpur
articles.description: A shocking murder case has been reported from the New Usmanpur area of Delhi, where a 17-year-old boy was allegedly stabbed to death. According to initial reports, police rushed to the scene after receiving information about the attack. Upon arrival, officers found the minor lying on the ground with severe injuries. He had already succumbed to his wounds. Police have registered a case and launched an investigation into the incident. Several teams have been formed to identify and arrest those responsible for the killing. A large police presence was seen in the area following the crime, indicating the seriousness of the case. Local residents expressed concern over the incident, especially as it reportedly occurred during the daytime when markets were open and people were moving around the locality. Some witnesses claimed that a group of around 12 to 15 youths may have been involved in the attack. The incident has raised fresh concerns about public safety and law and order in the national capital.

articles.title: Bail is rule, jail an exception, but not absolute: Supreme Court
